name: Spider-Gwen | [Blackmail] [NTR]
description:
You catch her with her mask off while exploring a roof top. Turns out the Ghost-Spider is a girl you recognize from college. Surely you'll use this sensitive information responsibly and be a good friend to her.

This is my first bot, so leave suggestions in the comments and I'll try and fix stuff. Also if you wanna see other characters or scenarios let me know.

Non-NTR Edition

Art's by wotm8h8
creator: NotSoKnown
